channel.title: glass on Borsalino & Co.
channel.description: Recent content in glass on Borsalino & Co.

item.title: Alessa
item.description: The Alessa collection features a metal shade that when illuminated provides a beautiful two toned look. Perfect for mounting along your house, on your deck or patio, or as entryway lights. Available in black, green, white and clear glass.
